summary: Core design correctly refuses CNPJ14 conflicts, keeps claim_level=similarity for historical contracts, and tags non_claims against open-tender participation. Isolation is enforced on scripts.linkage pipeline entry points. However, several proof and residual-risk gaps remain: circular auto-precision (no independent hard labels), CNPJ8-only auto-accept as fact, unresolved contract decisions counted in metrics but not persisted, workspace entity/competitors without isolation guard, review_queue non-idempotent, and campaign pytest real_db path skipped. No evidence production/soak was touched by the campaign run.

findings.risk: Covering only clean exact-CNPJ fixtures / auto strata as real precision proof (threat 7)
findings.expected: Preregistered human-labeled hard strata (ambiguous names, conflicting CNPJ, missing tax id) with independent precision estimate for auto-accepted links; real_db pipeline test executed under LINKAGE_TEST_DSN.
findings.observed: labeled-sample.json uses method=auto, expected_precision=1.0, strong_id_false_merges=0 with only exact_organ_cnpj14 and exact_contract_same_organ strata. linkage-quality claims precision_auto_accepted=1.0 tautologically for exact CNPJ14. verify-isolated unit step: 15 passed, 1 skipped (test_linkage_pipeline_on_isolated_dsn). Organ metrics: ambiguous=0, heuristic=0, unresolved=0 — no hard cases in the operational cut.
findings.impact: R6/spec precision≥99% is not independently demonstrated. Auto-accept correctness is defined as the rule itself (exact CNPJ), not validated against adversarial or ambiguous real records. Overclaim risk if DOD treats this as identity-quality acceptance.
findings.remediation_note: Addressed in post-review fix commit on campaign branch

findings.expected: entity/competitors (and any linkage-facing facade) refuse non-isolated/prod/soak DSN the same way as scripts.linkage.pipeline.assert_isolated.
findings.observed: scripts.linkage.pipeline and scripts.linkage.__main__ call assert_isolated. cmd_entity/cmd_competitors use try_pg_conn(get_dsn()) only — no isolation guard. Default DSN is LOCAL_DATALAKE_DSN or postgresql://test:test@127.0.0.1:5433/pncp_datalake. Any --dsn including remote/prod would be accepted if reachable.
findings.impact: Campaign isolation is partial. Operator or CI misconfiguration can read linkage tables or contracts on a non-campaign DSN without ISOLATION_GUARD_BLOCK. Does not prove prod was touched in this run (artifacts show 127.0.0.1:5438).
findings.remediation_note: Addressed in post-review fix commit on campaign branch

findings.risk: False merge / over-confident identity under weak keys (threat 1)
findings.command: python3 -c "from scripts.linkage.resolve import decide_opportunity_organ; print(decide_opportunity_organ('11222333', 'ORGAO A').as_dict()); print(decide_opportunity_organ('11222333', None).as_dict())"
findings.expected: CNPJ8-only (no full CNPJ14, no composite name) is heuristic_reviewable or unresolved; never auto_accept fact golden key for root-only.
findings.observed: decide_opportunity_organ: cnpj8-only → classification=deterministic_composite, score=0.99 (== AUTO_ACCEPT_MIN_SCORE), claim_level=fact, auto_accept=True, target_key=org:cnpj8:{root}. Invalid 14-digit CNPJs drop to cnpj8 root (keys.extract_organ_keys) and can auto-merge under the same root. conflicting_strong_ids is unit-tested but pipeline never passes candidate_keys into decide_opportunity_organ.
findings.impact: Distinct branches/units or dirty IDs sharing an 8-digit root can collapse into one golden organ and auto-accept. Residual false-merge surface not exercised by the all-exact CNPJ14 campaign sample.
findings.remediation_note: Addressed in post-review fix commit on campaign branch

findings.risk: Ambiguous/unresolved weakened in durable denominator / audit trail (threat 3)
findings.expected: Every observed decision (exact…unresolved/ambiguous) is persisted per run so denominators recomputed from DB match metrics; hard cases first-class in opportunity_contract_links.
findings.observed: MatchMetrics.observe() counts unresolved (metrics show contract unresolved=12/126; unresolved_in_denominator flag hardcoded True). But pipeline inserts opportunity_contract_links only when `d_ctr.classification != "unresolved" or d_ctr.score > 0`. decide_contract_to_opportunity always uses score=0.0 for unresolved, so unresolved rows are never written. Organ links are always inserted. entity_linkage_review_queue only for heuristic_reviewable|ambiguous, not unresolved.
findings.impact: DB-only audits undercount hard cases and cannot recompute the published contract denominator. Metrics flag is aspirational, not derived from stored rows. Partial control only.
findings.remediation_note: Addressed in post-review fix commit on campaign branch

findings.expected: Campaign isolation requires host local AND port in PREFERRED_PORTS (5438) and/or explicit DB name allowlist; non-preferred ports fail closed.
findings.observed: Non-preferred ports only append reasons like port_5433_not_preferred_5438; ok remains True if host is 127.0.0.1/localhost and no forbidden substring. Forbidden markers catch ec-prod/netcup/vps/soak paths in DSN string but not SSH tunnels of prod to localhost:5438.
findings.impact: Linkage can run against the wrong local database while still recording production_touched=false. Tunnel/prod-on-localhost is residual accepted risk if documented; soft port is fixable.
findings.remediation_note: Addressed in post-review fix commit on campaign branch

findings.risk: Non-idempotent links / side tables on re-run (threat 5)
findings.expected: Re-run same run_id is idempotent for all linkage tables including review_queue (unique natural key + ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING).
findings.observed: opportunity_*_links and observed_supplier_relations use unique indexes + ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING (good). entity_linkage_review_queue INSERT has no unique constraint and no ON CONFLICT — every re-run of heuristic/ambiguous decisions duplicates open queue rows. Also re-using run_id after rule change can leave old unique-key rows (classification/key components differ) alongside new ones.
findings.impact: Review queue pollution and ambiguous dual history under same run_id. Low practical impact on rc1 (ambiguous=0) but breaks the migration design claim of full idempotent re-run.
findings.remediation_note: Addressed in post-review fix commit on campaign branch

findings.risk: Claim that historical winner participated in open tender (threat 2) — residual data-model framing
findings.expected: Historical winners never appear as fact participants of the open opportunity; relation to opportunity is explicitly non-participatory in schema and UI.
findings.observed: Contract links correctly use claim_level=similarity + non_claims (not_observed_participant_of_open_tender, similarity_not_participation). Supplier identity uses claim_level=fact with reason observed_contract_winner and same non_claims. However observed_supplier_relations rows are keyed with opportunity_id + relation_kind=historical_winner, which can be read as “winner of this opportunity” by consumers ignoring non_claims. Workspace command is named competitors; notes mitigate but title DOSSIÊ CONCORRENTE remains loaded.
findings.impact: Downstream JSON consumers that ignore non_claims/claim_note can mis-report participation. Code and dossier text are mostly careful; residual product risk is naming/join shape, not missing non_claims on the happy path.

findings.risk: Over-broad inverse lookup / soft identity confusion (threat 1 residual)
findings.expected: Inverse supplier lookup matches exact canonical_key or exact CNPJ14/CPF11 only.
findings.observed: investigate_inverse_supplier uses supplier_canonical_key LIKE %digits% and LIKE %digits[:8]% parameterized — not SQLi, but short digit fragments can match unrelated keys.
findings.impact: False-positive inverse relations in entity --cnpj / inverse investigation if partial inputs are used.

findings.expected: All user/run inputs bound as parameters; no string-interpolated SQL from external values.
findings.observed: Queries use %s placeholders. max_opportunities interpolated only after int(). LIKE patterns built from digits_only filter. table branch in _insert_decision_row is internal string, not user input. No classic SQLi path found in linkage modules.
findings.impact: No open SQLi finding in scripts/linkage. Residual: workspace other commands not fully re-audited in this pass beyond entity/competitors parameterized queries.

findings.risk: False merge by similar names / conflicting CNPJ14 (threat 1) — control works for strong IDs
findings.expected: Conflicting CNPJ14 never auto-merge; name-only unresolved; contract different organ unresolved.
findings.observed: Unit tests and resolve.refuse_merge_if_conflict / conflicting_strong_ids implement refuse_strong_id_merge with classification=ambiguous, target_key=None. Name-only → unresolved. decide_contract_to_opportunity refuses different CNPJ14/8. Campaign sample had 0 strong-id false merges by construction (exact CNPJ only).
findings.impact: Primary threat control is implemented and unit-tested. Residual risk is weak-key path (see F-CNPJ8-ONLY-AUTO-FACT), not name-only merge.

residual_risks: Localhost SSH tunnel of production to 127.0.0.1:5438 bypasses host-marker isolation (document operationally; cannot fully code-block).
Auto-accepted exact CNPJ precision is definitional; source-data CNPJ labeling errors are not audited.
Operational cut (20 radar opps overlapping contract organs) is easy-mode for link rate; not a hard-case stress test.
Full 4.4M dump not loaded into RC (manifest non_claim); scale behavior of unique indexes/idempotency unproven at full volume.
candidate_keys conflict path is dead in pipeline — only pure unit tests exercise refuse_merge against two key sets.
method_notes: Independent static adversarial review of scripts/linkage/**, migration 061, workspace entity/competitors, tests, and campaign artifacts under artifacts/campaigns/CANONICAL-ENTITY-LINKAGE-01/.
Campaign artifacts (verify-isolated, linkage-quality, investigation, isolation) used as run evidence; real_db pytest was skipped in recorded verify step.
No push, no VPS, no soak paths exercised by this reviewer.
summary_post_fix: High workspace isolation and CNPJ8 auto-accept fixed; unresolved persisted; port isolation fail-closed; precision honesty documented as strong-id audit not human fuzzy study.
